name: credmesh.xyz
summary: CredMesh (by Unbrained Labs, v0.7.0) is an early-stage DeFi protocol offering unsecured credit to autonomous AI agents: LPs deposit USDC into a shared ERC-4626 vault, and that capital funds short-duration, uncollateralized advances underwritten by oracles (Hyperliquid balance, reputation score, or signed task certification) rather than collateral — so LPs bear default risk pro-rata.
